BatchChangeToPrepaid.config: Configuration for batch converting instances to prepaid (yearly/monthly), up to 20 instances supported
BatchChangeToPrepaid.config.autoRenew: Whether to auto-renew after expiration; true: auto-renew, false: no auto-renew; default: false
BatchChangeToPrepaid.config.autoRenewPeriod: Duration (in months) for each auto-renewal. Valid values: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,12,24,36; default: 1. Only effective when autoRenew is true.
BatchChangeToPrepaid.config.cdsList: (Deprecated) List of associated data disks to convert; default empty; "all" means all associated data disks (e.g. "cdsList":["all"]); pass specific disk IDs to convert only selected disks
BatchChangeToPrepaid.config.autoPay: Whether to pay automatically; default true
